Module com.example.ventana
Package com.example.ventana.model

Interface IGameState

All Known Implementing Classes:
GameState
public interface IGameState
The IGameState interface defines the contract for managing the current state of the game. Implementations of this interface are responsible for storing and updating the level, time per level, and the current word.

Main responsibilities include:

  • Providing access to the current level, time per level, and word.
  • Allowing updates to the game state values.
  • Resetting the game to its initial state.

This interface separates the state management from the game logic, enabling cleaner architecture and easier maintenance.

Author:
Nerie

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getCurrentWord()
    Returns the current word stored in the game state.
    int
    getLevel()
    Returns the current level of the game.
    int
    getTimePerLevel()
    Returns the time allowed per level in seconds.
    void
    resetGame()
    Resets the game state to its initial values.
    void
    setCurrentWord(String word)
    Updates the current word stored in the game state.
    void
    setLevel(int level)
    Updates the current level of the game.
    void
    setTimePerLevel(int time)
    Updates the time allowed per level.

  • Method Details

    • getLevel

      int getLevel()
      Returns the current level of the game.
      Returns:
      the current level as an int.

    • getTimePerLevel

      int getTimePerLevel()
      Returns the time allowed per level in seconds.
      Returns:
      the time per level as an int.

    • getCurrentWord

      String getCurrentWord()
      Returns the current word stored in the game state.
      Returns:
      the current word as a String.

    • setLevel

      void setLevel(int level)
      Updates the current level of the game.
      Parameters:
      level - the new level value.

    • setTimePerLevel

      void setTimePerLevel(int time)
      Updates the time allowed per level.
      Parameters:
      time - the new time per level in seconds.

    • setCurrentWord

      void setCurrentWord(String word)
      Updates the current word stored in the game state.
      Parameters:
      word - the new word as a String.

    • resetGame

      void resetGame()
      Resets the game state to its initial values.

      The level is set to 1, the time per level is reset to 20 seconds, and the current word is cleared.
